recommendations: path_assumption_bias on use-sync-q.ts has now failed in five consecutive sessions — this specific path is either permanently absent or has been moved; a one-time ls of the hooks directory before any Read on use-sync-q.ts would terminate this recurring failure chain; the pattern is now severe enough to warrant a hook or a persistent note rather than another calibration recommendation
